title: Biome Creepers O'Plenty
description: A pack that adds biome-specific creeper skins for the Biomes O'Plenty biomes. Based on Biome Creepers - Nitpicks
body:
based on (and uses some data from) [Biome Creepers - Nitpicks](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/biome-creepers)by Rage_Spark. requires EMF or optifine.

adds biome-specific textures for creepers in biomes o'plenty. all textures were made by me in blockbench using BOP textures.
> ![A GIF displaying the various creeper textures added in this pack. In order, they use the textures of Rainbow Birch trees, Red Maple trees, Rose Bushes, Orange Maple trees, Dead trees, Yellow Maple trees, Fungal Jungle grass, Overgrown Greens grass, Glowing Moss, Umbran trees, Jacaranda trees, Snowblossom trees, and Mossy Black Sandstone.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7389de5344d306ea8d580b633878d4b56e7f0f88.gif)

if you're having trouble getting this to work, place it **above** the Biome Creepers - Nitpicks pack in the resource pack list. this does not contain all of the textures and properties of Rage_Spark's pack, so download that as well for the full effect.
